profiles.description: Current Python interpreter and current PATH used by the active shell.
notes: This is the default readiness profile.
It is suitable for CI/default checks because it performs import and command availability detection only.

profiles.description: Dedicated optional solver conda environment for PyMeep, meep.mpb, and other solver Python packages.
profiles.path_policy: caller supplied; not required in CI
notes: This profile is optional and maintainer-local.
Tests must not require the hinted path to exist.
The readiness script uses this interpreter for import-only Python probes when OSA_SOLVER_PYTHON is set.

profiles.description: Current PATH with Homebrew-style CLI tools such as gmsh.
notes: This profile is useful for CLI availability checks.
The readiness script uses command path detection only for CLI probes and does not run solver binaries.

profiles.description: Elmer remains deferred until a maintainable ElmerSolver install route exists.
notes: Readiness remains documentation-only until an explicit maintainer-approved local install route exists.
